metaTitle: Case Converter — Free Online Text Case Conversion Tool
metaDescription: Convert text to uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, camelCase, snake_case and more instantly. 100% private — your text never leaves your device.

howto.description: Type or paste any text into the input box.
Click any case button to instantly convert your text.
Click Copy to copy the converted text to your clipboard.

why: 100% private — your text never leaves your browser
10 case formats including camelCase, snake_case and kebab-case
Works completely offline after the initial page load
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.a: camelCase writes compound words with no spaces, where each word after the first starts with a capital letter. Example: myVariableName. It's commonly used in programming.
snake_case writes words in lowercase separated by underscores. Example: my_variable_name. It's commonly used in Python and database naming.
kebab-case writes words in lowercase separated by hyphens. Example: my-variable-name. It's commonly used in URLs and CSS class names.
Title Case capitalizes the first letter of each word. Example: This Is Title Case. It's commonly used in headings and titles.
Sentence case capitalizes only the first letter of the first word in a sentence. Example: This is sentence case. It's the most natural way to write text.
No. Everything runs in your browser. Your text is never sent to any server or saved anywhere.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Naming variables and CSS classes for developers
Sensitive text/code never leaves your device
Real-time updates as you type or click
Fast workflow for writing and editing

troubleshooting: Unexpected characters? Some cases like snake_case or kebab-case may automatically replace special characters or spaces with underscores/hyphens to maintain formatting.
Title Case not working? Ensure your text has spaces between words. Our algorithm identifies word boundaries to capitalize the correct letters.
Formatting lost? This tool converts plain text. If you paste rich text (bold/italics), only the character case will be preserved in the output.
proTips: Use 'kebab-case' for naming your website's URL slugs and CSS class names to improve SEO and maintainability.
If you accidentally wrote an entire paragraph with 'Caps Lock' on, simply paste it here and click 'Sentence case' to fix it instantly.
Developers: Use 'camelCase' or 'snake_case' to quickly reformat variable names when switching between JavaScript and Python coding environments.
